# Fortera Homes — Beechwood Collection

> Luxury 2 and 3 bedroom rentals in Beechwood, Ottawa. Coming Spring 2027 to 82 Genest St, Beechwood South. Pre-registration now open.

Beechwood Collection by Fortera Homes is a new 8-unit rental building at 82 Genest St in Ottawa's Beechwood South neighbourhood. The development offers spacious 2 bedroom and 3 bedroom suites with premium finishes, high ceilings, in-suite laundry, and private balconies. Estimated completion is Spring 2027.

## The Development

- **Project name:** Beechwood Collection
- **Developer:** Fortera Homes
- **Address:** 82 Genest St, Ottawa, ON, K1L, Canada
- **Neighbourhood:** Beechwood South, Ottawa
- **Units:** 8 residential suites
- **Unit types:** 2 bedroom and 3 bedroom rentals
- **Size range:** 860 to 920 sq ft
- **Status:** Active development — pre-registration open
- **Estimated completion:** Spring 2027

## Available Floor Plans

- **Elmwood A** — 2 bed / 1 bath, 860 sq ft (ground floor)
- **Elmwood B** — 2 bed / 1 bath, 860 sq ft (ground floor)
- **Manor A** — 3 bed / 2 bath, 920 sq ft (2nd and 3rd floor)
- **Manor B** — 3 bed / 2 bath, 920 sq ft (2nd and 3rd floor)
- **Rideau A (Executive)** — 2 bed / 2 bath, 920 sq ft (top floor)
- **Rideau B (Executive)** — 2 bed / 2 bath, 920 sq ft (top floor)

## Suite Features

- Premium finishes throughout
- High ceilings
- In-suite laundry
- Private balconies
- Modern kitchens with quality appliances
- Large windows
- Storage units

## Project Timeline

- 2025: Planning & Design
- 2025–2026: Permits & Approvals
- 2026: Construction
- Spring 2027: Estimated Completion

## Location & Neighbourhood

82 Genest St is located in Beechwood South, one of Ottawa's most walkable and bikeable urban neighbourhoods.

- **Walk Score:** 94 — Walker's Paradise
- **Transit Score:** 58 — Good Transit (OC Transpo)
- **Bike Score:** 99 — Biker's Paradise
- Nearby: restaurants, cafés, parks, cycling trails, fitness facilities

## About Fortera Homes

Fortera Homes is grounded in hands-on construction expertise. The company is committed to superior craftsmanship, responsible development, and building lasting communities. Core values include vision-driven design, premium build quality, strategic site selection, and trusted execution with full transparency.

Mission: to build lasting homes and enduring value by utilizing hands-on construction expertise to develop high-quality communities with integrity and vision.
